channel.title: AI Safe@Work — Changelog
channel.description: Public release notes for AI Safe@Work — quarterly minor releases, patch fixes as needed. Each release walks every citation against its primary source and refreshes against regulator publications.

item.title: v2026.06 — LMS distribution + EU-language shells
item.dc:creator: AI Safe@Work editorial
item.description:
Procurement gates 4, 5, 13, 14 closed.

  • SCORM 1.2 package — IMS CAM v1.2 manifest, single-SCO, 80% mastery, 2-hour cap. Deployable on Moodle, Cornerstone, Workday Learning, SCORM Cloud.
  • xAPI (Tin Can) adapter — HTTPS-gated POST to any conformant LRS. Anonymous-actor default, no auth-in-URL.
  • French and German language shells under /v2/fr/ and /v2/de/ — machine-translation banner pending native review.
  • JSON-LD (WebSite / Course / LearningResource / BreadcrumbList) + canonical + hreflang + OpenGraph + Twitter card across 39 v2 pages.

Open: native-speaker review of FR + DE; custom-domain purchase + DNS.

item.title: v2026.05 — Initial release
item.dc:creator: AI Safe@Work editorial
item.description:
Initial public release.

  • 12 universal modules — why this course exists, what AI tools do with data, the never-paste list, picking the right tool, verifying outputs, AI-powered scams, bias and fairness, copyright and IP, logging, incident response, the 60-second checklist, the standards.
  • 2 Relevant Roles — Manager and DPO / compliance lead.
  • 2 ship-ready templates — Acceptable Use Policy and AI vendor diligence questionnaire.
  • Standards Map (57 clause-to-module rows, 88 cross-link pills); Citations bibliography (every claim → primary source with confidence flag).
  • Standards baseline: EU AI Act 2024/1689, GDPR, ISO/IEC 42001:2023, ISO/IEC 27001:2022, NIST AI RMF 1.0 + GAI Profile, OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025).
